elements.text:
All individuals involved in research
Share code/data in a repository 
The minimal requirement is the deposition of the numerical data (processed data) underlying the figures in academic papers and PhD theses.
PhD’s
Before 2019: encouraged to share data but not required
2019: Share code/data underlying the articles/thesis
2020: write a Data Management Plan in the first year
Part of the Go/No-Go meeting
Supervisor is responsible for reviewing and approving the DMP and the Faculty Data Steward can be contacted for support.

TU Delft Research Data Framework
Faculty Policy
